allow: Bash(timeout 5 bash -c "until curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done")
Bash(timeout 3 bash -c "until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/auth/providers > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.5; done")
Bash(timeout 5 bash -c "until curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/auth/providers 2>&1 | grep -q 'credentials'; do sleep 1; done")
